data.proposal_preview: Build an AI-powered SaaS dashboard for enterprise analytics

weaknesses.challenge: No A/B test data supports the proposed UX flow. Competitor analysis shows 3 alternatives with proven conversion funnels.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing market validation.

weaknesses.challenge: Data handling practices may not comply with GDPR Article 17 (right to erasure).
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing regulatory risk.

weaknesses.challenge: Competitor release calendar shows 2 major launches within our planned launch window.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing go-to-market timing.

data.message: The Critic remains unconvinced. Reasoning score: 6.7/10. Combined: 6.6/10. Consider addressing: Regulatory Risk, Go-to-Market Timing. You may try again or use Hard Override.

data.proposal_preview: Launch an AI-powered enterprise analytics platform

weaknesses.challenge: The current architecture shows no auto-scaling strategy. At 10x load, response times will breach SLA thresholds.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing scalability.

weaknesses.challenge: No documentation bus-factor analysis. Knowledge concentration creates existential risk.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing team dependency.

weaknesses.challenge: No re-engagement mechanism exists. Users who churn have no recovery path.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing user retention.

data.message: The Critic remains unconvinced. Reasoning score: 6.7/10. Combined: 6.3/10. Consider addressing: Scalability, Team Dependency. You may try again or use Hard Override.

weaknesses.challenge: Dependency tree includes 6 packages with known CVEs. No remediation timeline exists.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing technical debt.

weaknesses.challenge: The technology stack is commodity. Differentiation must come from execution speed, not architecture.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing competitive moat.

weaknesses.challenge: Database write patterns suggest single-node bottleneck. No sharding or replication strategy is documented.
weaknesses.required_evidence: Provide data or reasoning addressing scalability.
